mapper.sql: id, user_id, category, title, description, create_time, update_time
id, stage_id, user_id, title, content, learned_hours, estimated_hours, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stage_goal (id, user_id, category, title, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sub_goal WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM stage_goal ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT FROM stage_goal WHERE 1=1
AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{lastDays} DAY)
ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{exportSize}
